# [BEGIN] DEVELOPMENT INFORMATION:

# Sample: Anoplate AnoBlack NiTE w/ Blast on Steel 1008 (So #: 1117496)
# Scatterometer: Wyant College's J&C RT-300S
# Light source: red laser (650 nm, 3.5mm spot diam.)
# Angles measured: (I,A,R) = (10:20:70, -90:10:90, -80:10:80)
# Number of measurements averaged: 6
# Blank dataset: 'blank_v2o0_20250911_eitherWayItsATragedy.xls'
# Dataset(s): 'NiTE_on_steel_v1o0A_20250915.xls', 'NiTE_on_steel_v1o0B_20250916.xls', 'NiTE_on_steel_v1o0C_20250916.xls'
# Processing script: 'process_RT300S_data_v1o0.m'
# Date(s) measured: 2025/09/15, 2025/09/16
# Note(s): - data from (A=[-90,0],R) and (A=[0,90],-R) considered unique because isotropic sample and therefore PlaneSymmetrical, hence 6 measurements from 3 datasets;
#          - TIS calculated over entire hemisphere, i.e., Az=[0,360), but only from BRDF values reported here so assuming BRDF=0 beyond Rz>=90
# Point of contact: Jacob P. Krell (jacobpkrell@arizona.edu)
# 
# [END] DEVELOPMENT INFORMATION.
# ======================================================
# ======================================================
